Minimal Clinical

Services.

Focused engagements. Defined outputs. No theater.

AI Strategy Advisory

Decision support for AI priorities, investment choices, vendor evaluation, operating model, and executive narrative.

Executive AI Fluency

Private coaching and working sessions for women leaders who need practical technical literacy and stronger room presence.

Board & Leadership Briefings

Structured briefings for boards and executive teams covering risk, governance, opportunity, and measurement.

Ready for the next room?

Bring the pressure, the ambition, and the open questions. Lakecia will help you turn them into a leadership position.
